calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend The Pleadings And For Entry Of Final Judgment On An Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER 1330 INGRAHAM AVENUE, LLC's Motion To Amend The Pleadings And For Entry Of Final Judgment On An Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

1330 Ingraham Avenue, LLC's unopposed motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
